name: io.github.xiaojiou176-open/webaudit-mcp
title: Webaudit MCP
description: Governed stdio MCP surface for Webaudit browser-evidence, retained proof, and recovery workflows.

environmentVariables.name: UIQ_MCP_API_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Optional Webaudit backend base URL when the MCP server should call a live backend.

environmentVariables.name: UIQ_MCP_WORKSPACE_ROOT
environmentVariables.description: Optional absolute path to the Webaudit workspace root when the MCP server should read a different checkout.

environmentVariables.name: UIQ_MCP_AUTOMATION_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Optional backend automation token for live API-backed MCP calls.
